feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Marketing Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Marketing Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Adapt UI depending on user role
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

can i create an UI in dependency of an user role or marketing area? 

For example: Some Users should see more Tabs or Custom Fields in the Contacts-App than others. 

Thanks for your help!
Katharina

entry.title: Lead Scoring - Saving and Retention
entry.content:
Hi Community!

Could someone please explain how do Save and Retention Period work in the Score Builder App, more specifically where are scores saved?

I could find documentation around when the saving is done (daily at 12 pm, weekly on Sunday.. etc), but I dont understand where those scores are saved and where I can see the history of the changes within scores for certain users?

Also, how does Retention period work? What is the main purpose of this feature? I have one potential use case: what would happen if the Saving is set to monthly, but Retention period is 2 days?

Many thanks,
Cagri - On behalf of @PedjaStan

entry.title: What is the use of Retention Period for Scores
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please explain what is the use of Retention Period for Scores

what will happen if i select

Scores Saved = Monthly

Retention Period for Scores = 2 days

Regards,

Amshu

entry.title: Segmentation Base Population Restrictions
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a request to restrict the base population of the Contacts Segmentation profile.  The requirement is to filter out contacts who have not engaged within the last 12 months.  Additionally, the requirement is to focus only on certain interaction types, such as web visits, forms submissions and message response (opens, click-thrus) - basically positive interactions that demonstrate intent.

One option would be to use re-usable segmentation building blocks, but ideally we'd like to have the population pre-filtered so users do not need to do anything.  I've also looked at applying a filter to the profile within the Segmentation Configuration app, but not sure this will cover the full requirements.

If anyone has any advice on how to address this requirement I'd be greatful!

Regards,

Bradley

entry.title: Complete export of all customer data (Marketing Cloud)
entry.content:
I would like to export all my customers' contact information from the SAP Marketing Cloud. We are currently preparing the migration to a new tool and therefore need the information.
I was told that I can use the Customer Data Return app.
I can't currently find the right data source for the export.
Can anyone help me?

entry.title: Form - Regular Expression Input Validation Message
entry.content:
Hi,

We built a Form in SAP Marketing Cloud, and wanted to apply extra validation to First Name, that it should have at least 2 letters.

We used the box "Regular Expression" for it with ^[a-zA-A]{2,}$

Technically this works fine, however when we try to submit the form with a first name with one single character, a validation message shows "The input must match the specified regular expression ^[a-zA-A]{2,}$". Not a very nice User Experience of course, and meaningless to most people 🙂

On other fields with a standard validation such as email, there is a box for Input Validation Message, where the custom error message can be written.

However, on First Name, where I applied the RegEx, I cannot seem to find an Input Validation Message box ...

Is it not possible to overwrite that technical validation message when using RegEx?!

 

Kind regards,

Joyca Vervinckt

entry.title: Custom CDS View for Customer and Contact
entry.content:
Hi - I am currently creating a customer CDS view for API extraction. I want to return the Corporate Account to Contact relationship easily. I am currently using I_MKT_ContactRelationData & I_Mkt_Contact but it's not showing the relationship if I filter on the corporate account.

Is there a different data source we should use?

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Bounce Details Amazon SES
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for more details on the Bounce interactions that come in to SAP Marketing Cloud via Amazon SES.

The reason is that we get quite a lot of Soft Bounces that I believe should be Hard Bounces.

For example emails to an email address ending in @sknet.be which is a typo and should be skynet.be . But a soft bounce comes in on that address... Neverbounce does indicate this as an invalid address, so I am wondering why Amazon classifies it as a soft bounce.

 

I have already tried to look in the following fields for more details about the bounces:

  • Interaction Reason
  • Content Data

These fields sometimes contain additional data, but not in the case of my bounce on the @sknet address, on that case it is empty (and on a lot more cases too, about half of the soft bounces do have some value in the fields, the other half does not).

 

I also checked the analytics report mentioned on https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/sap-marketing-cloud-email-bounce-monitoring-best-practices/ba-p/13556163 , there is a field "Bus. Doc. Stat. Des." where for some soft bounces, more info about the smtp status code is mentioned, but still a large majority of soft bounces have an empty value in that field, including the soft bounce of the @sknet address case...

 

Does anyone know of any other data or fields that can be checked to get more detailed technical information about the bounce? 

Thanks,

Joyca

entry.title: Permission for each facet
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

i need the following report: 

Contact Origin | Contact ID | E-Mail of this origin | Permission of this e-mail

The problem is that I only get the e-mail and permission from the best record and not the e-mail and permission from the origin.

Does anybody have a solution for this?

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Custom Fields Type "Number" should be empty
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

is it posslible that a custom field of the type number is empty and not 0.

We would like to differentiate in segmentation. 

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: How can I delete multiple entries in the CBO? HELP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

how can I delete multiple entries in the CBO?

I followed the steps exactly as described in this post,

How to delete multiple CBO entries - SAP Community

but unfortunately, I’m getting an error. Are there any other ways to delete the entries?

entry.title: "Email Draft Version" to limited access rights for sensitive or undisclosed information
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a use case and I hope that someone can help me or has ideas on how to implement it.

Requirement: In addition to newsletters, we also use the SMC to send discrete information that must be kept confidential until a certain date. This means that only a certain group of people can have access to this email.

In our old mailing solution there was a "draft" feature that restricted the visibility of the mailing (PR, announcement, etc.) (in the content studio) so that only certain people or the editor could see it.

We are now trying to implement something similar in the SMC, but it is important that we have 1 marketing area (for subscriptions etc.) on which there is public and non-public content.

One idea would be to build a kind of mirror marketing area, possibly via custom logic, which always synchronizes the subscriptions between the real and the fake one.
So permission and subscription take place on the real MA. This information is then copied into the Shadow MA and this is where the mailing is created and sent. The logic then copies the unsubscriptions from the Shadow MA back to the real one. Only selected people then receive access to this second marketing area.

entry.title: Export Conditions from mail
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a mail with one block on which there are a lot of conditions (30-something I guess). 

Does anyone know if there is a way to export the conditions?

I see they are mentioned in the HTML, but only the name of the condition. Not the exact rule that is behind it.

I would like to make an export, to be able to quickly see whether all my rules have been set up correctly, instead of opening them all one by one.

Thanks,

Joyca

entry.title: Export Custom Field "Amount with Currency"
entry.content:
Hi Community,

when I export a custom field of type "Amount with Currency" (i create a target group and export via export definition) the Amount with Currency comes out in the format 10.70€ for 10,70€. In Excel it then becomes "Oct 70" and when I convert it to a number it becomes “25842” which is obviously not equal to 10,70€.

You can adjust the decimal format in the general settings, but this has no effect on the export.

Does anyone have a workaround?

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Coupon change relationship type after release
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an Offer with a Coupon assigned to it.

I realized too late that the Coupon's relationship type is on "Contact Assigned Dynamically", and it should be "No Contact Assigned".

The Offer and Coupon are released and actively used in emails.

 

Is there some way that I can still change the Coupon's relationship type? 

Or do I need to create a new Offer, new Coupon (and somehow figure out which codes of my old coupon were already distributed and which not...) and change all my mails to use the new offer? 😬

entry.title: Change of Landing Page domain in Marketing Cloud: No Redirection in old campaigns?
entry.content:
Hello community,

We have a question regarding the change of the content repository domain in MC.

After changing this domain our newly published Landingpages get the new domain in URL. This works as expected. Our old Landingpage Domain is additionally still active in CDNetworks, so also the accesses to the old Landingpages with old Domain work without any problems.

In MC we have campaigns that were created (NOT SENT YET) before the domain change and that consist of old Landingpages. When unpublishing and republishing these Landingpages now, the Landingpages of course also receive the new domain.
But we KEEP the “old” LP URLs within the mails. Sending out these campaigns NOW and clicking on these old LP URLs within the mail as recipient, this successfully will lead to the new domain.

But what is the expected behavior of the MC for mails that were not only created but also sent out before the domain change?
Scenario: Campaign that consists of a landing page is sent. Landingpage is unpublished and  republished and receives new domain. If a recipient now clicks on this Landingpage within the “old” mail, he/she will be directed to the old domain. There is no forwarding from the old to the new domain in these cases. Is this the intended behavior of the MC?
For old campaigns, will the URLs be redirected to the new URL after some time? Currently, it seems like still the old URL opens up even after the LP is unpublished and republished again when the LP link is reached from a campaign previously sent.

Thanks for your support and kind regards
Sören

entry.title: Countdown Timer in Marketing Mail (SAP Marketing Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible in SAP Marketing Cloud to have a Countdown Timer such as in the example below in an email?

If so, how can it be done?

entry.title: How to create a segmentation profile where contacts have country or marketing area?
entry.content: I need to create a Segmentation Profile and filter only those contacts which either contains country information or Marketing Area information. How can I do it?

entry.title: Uploading Document in SAP Marketing Cloud forms
entry.content: Greetings, I would like to know if it is possible to enable Document Upload option in SAP Marketing Cloud forms. Is it possible to have a custom field as a box for documents upload? If so, can you please provide me with the steps to enable that? If not, what is the best approach using SAP Document Service? My current approach is a bit complex as I have to send SAP DMS folder link separately to each contact registered in SAP Marketing Cloud.

entry.title: Restrict Business Users from Deleting Contacts because of multiple Marketing Area
entry.content:
We have the following Problem: User can delete contacts in the contacts app which share more than one Marketing Area!

Background: 
Contacts are assigned to multiple Marketing Areas with several Subscriptions. Different User Roles have access to different Marketing Areas eg:

  • Business Unit A - Marketing Area A
  • Business Unit B - Marketing Area B 
  • etc.

If a User from Business Unit A now deletes a contact which also has Marketing Area B, C and D, the contact with all its subscriptions / interactions is being deleted for all Marketing Areas.  

My goal is that all business roles have access to Write, Read Access to "Import, Change Values for Custom fields, Create Target Groups etc" but I do not want that users are able to delete contacts, as this has an impact on other business units as well, as contacts have multiple subscriptions etc.

- We have tried to restrict the Write, Read access which then causes issues that Users can purely see but not import / update contacts anymore via contacts app anymore

- I have also tried to check a different layout, but I cant remove the "Delete Button" from the Layout. 

 

Does someone has a clue or idea on I can restrict users from being able to delete contacts via the contacts app but still be able to import change data or create contacts? Any help is highly appreciated. 

BR
Sascha
